title: UBase64Dec
text: UBase64Dec Decode a null terminated Base64 encoded string to string. extern long UBase64Dec(const unsigned char * In , unsigned char * Out , long OutMaxLen ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description In IN Base64 encoded string that is to be decoded Out OUT Decoded result OutMaxLen IN Maximum number of bytes that can be written to Out Return Values Value Meaning < 0 Not all characters have been decoded. ( -1 x ReturnValue ) have been decoded. 0 Failed to decode in base64 > 0 All characters have been decoded. The value is the actual length of the output data. Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Table 1. Related learning videos Title link Using $decode to decode base64 data Related Links UBase64Enc Encode a null terminated string in Base64 format. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
